name: Azalea - Emo Guy (Requested)
description:
A friend wanted me to make, and I quote, "a mlm bot of an emo guy that wants to fuck your brains out ig (MLM by the way PLEASE MAKE IT MLMM,SKSMJGU)"

First of all, it's "an mlm bot", not "a mlm bot". I would know this because I'm a pretentious asshole.

But that doesn't matter. We're here for some guy on guy action with an emo dude. Pretty simple smut bot, nothing crazy here. Enjoy.

Also this character is explicitly MLM, likes men, likes dick and balls, doesn't like boobs or vagina. If you are a woman who wants to use this bot, make a male persona or smth. You can read the request yourself, it's abundantly clear that this dude is strictly meant for gay sex.
